nodes.shortSummary: 暗冠蓝鸦（学名：Cyanocitta stelleri），又名斯特勒蓝鸦（Steller's Jay），原生於北美洲西部和中美洲，共有6个亚种，是分布於北美洲其余地区的冠蓝鸦的近缘种，外形的不同之处在於暗冠蓝鸦的头颈部为黑色。它们是落基山脉西部唯一一种北美洲松鸦，在所有的北美洲…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Steller's jay occurs in most of the forested areas of western North America as far east as the eastern foothills of the Rocky Mountains from southern Alaska in the north to northern Nicaragua in the south completely replacing the blue jay prevalent on the rest of the continent in those areas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Steller's jay occurs in most of the forested areas of western North America as far east as the eastern foothills of the Rocky Mountains from southern Alaska in the north to northern Nicaragua in the south completely replacing the blue jay prevalent on the rest of the continent in those areas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the northern end of its range it appears to be spreading from coastal Southeast Alaska across the Coast Mountains into southern Yukon Territory. Steller's jay is also found in Mexico's interior highlands from Chihuahua and Sonora in the northwest southward to Jalisco, as well as other patchy populations found throughout Mexico
